arts.ttl: 5 reasons Bayern will win Der Klassiker against Borussia Dortmund
arts.sum: Their ability to remain so dominant away from the Allianz Arena will hold them in good stead when they visit the Signal Iduna Park, especially given Dortmund ’s home form that has seen them go unbeaten at home in 11 games in all competitions. Their ability to find the back of the net is not the only reason Bayern are sitting atop the Bundesliga table right now; they also have the best defensive record in the league, with just seven goals conceded in their first 11 matches.

arts.ttl: Champions League Match Preview: Dortmund Look for Rare Away Win in Zagreb
arts.sum: Unfortunately, they will first have to try to get over their away demons tomorrow in the Croatian capital against Dinamo Zagreb in the Champions League. So far, their most noteworthy moment of the season came when they were thoroughly steamrolled by Bayern Munich to the tune of 9-2 in the first match week of the Champions League.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: Dortmund Host Anaemic SC Freiburg
arts.sum: In good keeping with their Jekyll-and-Hyde home and away form, BVB were dominant and assured in front of their fans, with Freiburg truly lucky to only have received four goals against their keeper. Freiburg came in with a terrible game plan but Schlotterbeck did well to Shepard them away from goal.

arts.ttl: Sebastian Kehl addresses Borussia Dortmund’s poor away form
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund may have a 100 percent record at the Westfalenstadion this season, but their away form is a cause for concern. Nuri Şahin’s side have suffered six consecutive defeats…

arts.ttl: Boost for Borussia Dortmund as duo return
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy and Emre Can both return for Borussia Dortmund’s Champions League game against Dinamo Zagreb on Wednesday night after missing Saturday’s win against Freiburg. Guirassy (28), who is Dortmund’s…

arts.ttl: Report: Dortmund to rest Guirassy against Dinamo Zagreb
arts.sum: Serhou Guirassy is not expected to start for Borussia Dortmund against Dinamo Zagreb, according to Sky Germany.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs. Borussia Dortmund preview: Team news and predicted lineups
arts.sum: Here is our preview of Wednesday's UEFA Champions League clash between Dinamo Zagreb and Borussia Dortmund, including our predicted lineups.

arts.ttl: Dinamo Zagreb vs. Borussia Dortmund: UEFA Champions League probable teams, match stats and LIVE blog!
arts.sum: Borussia Dortmund, who currently sit seventh in the UEFA Champions League standings, travel to Dinamo Zagreb where they'll aim to continue what has been a strong European campaign so far with another win on Wednesday (kick-off: 9pm CET). Dortmund had to do without Gregor Kobel, Julian Ryerson and Waldemar Anton in that game, all of whom featured in their win against Freiburg and will therefore be available for their trip to Croatia.

arts.ttl: Preview: Dinamo Zagreb vs. Borussia Dortmund - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Wednesday's Champions League clash between Dinamo Zagreb and Borussia Dortmund, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Zorc elected to Dortmund supervisory board
arts.sum: Michael Zorc returns to Borussia Dortmund as a member of the supervisory board.
